name: get_sso_authorization_url
description: Generate an SSO authorization URL to redirect a user to their identity provider (Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, etc.) for login. The user completes authentication there and is redirected back.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: The URL to redirect the user to after SSO authentication.

parameters.name: organization
parameters.description: The organization ID to authenticate against.

parameters.name: connection
parameters.description: The SSO connection ID to use. Provide this or organization.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: An opaque state parameter to prevent CSRF and maintain state.

body.note: Redirects to the identity provider login page. After authentication, the user is redirected to your redirect_uri with a 'code' query parameter.
